title: Host a citizenship ceremony - Canada.ca
content:
## Host a citizenship ceremony
A citizenship ceremony is a special event where successful citizenship applicants take the oath of citizenship and officially become Canadian citizens.
Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) organizes citizenship ceremonies across Canada. We often work with community organizations to create welcoming celebrations that honour new citizens and Canada’s rich cultural diversity.
Find out how you can host or take part in a citizenship ceremony in your community.
